opportunities.title: Head of Early Career Recruiting
opportunities.description: Who We Are  Notion is the collaborative AI workspace where teams and agents  think together . We're building one place where your knowledge, projects, meetings, and AI tools live side by side, so work is faster, clearer, and less fragmented. Millions of individuals, small teams, and large companies run their work on Notion.    Notinos (our employees) are customer zero in bringing this future of work to life. opportunities.title: [Hiring] (Online) Marketing support
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] (Online) Marketing support

Our budget is $20 - $30 per hour depending on experience. We’re looking for someone experienced with marketing to support us on a couple of projects. These are predominantly tech based (read SaaS) but we also have an e-commerce site we’re looking to build more traction on. If you’re interested in working with a business with a varied portfolio, and know how to target and grab the attention of potential customers then we want to hear from you. opportunities.description: About the Team   OpenAI’s mission is to ensure that general-purpose artificial intelligence benefits all of humanity. opportunities.title: Regional Director, Forward Deployed Engineering
opportunities.description: Our mission is to automate coding. The first step in our journey is to build the best tool for professional programmers, using a combination of inventive research, design, and engineering. Our organization is very flat, and our team is small and talent dense. We particularly like people who are truth-seeking, passionate, and creative. We enjoy spirited debate, crazy ideas, and shipping code.   About the role   We're building a Forward Deployed Engineering team to close the gap between the value our enterprise customers expect from Cursor and the value they're actually getting.
